name: provenance manifest signature is required and must use the sha256 colon prefix format
command: printf '{"commit":"abc","signature":"plaintext-no-prefix"}\n' > prov.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/compliance/validate-provenance-manifest.sh" --manifest prov.json --check signature 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -ne 0 ] && grep -q 'invalid_signature_format' err.txt && grep -q 'expected_prefix=sha256:' err.txt && echo blocked 1>&2
